---
title: "Interop with nibabel"
subtitle: "Cross the boundary in both directions, explicitly."
jupyter: python3
sidebar: cookbook
---

## Goal

You already hold a `nibabel` image (some upstream tool produced it),
or you need to hand a typed `neuroim` object to a tool that speaks
`nibabel`. Cross the boundary explicitly, with the spatial frame
preserved both ways.

## Code

```{python}
from pathlib import Path
import sys

sys.path.insert(0, str(Path.cwd().parents[1] / "src"))

import nibabel as nib
import neuroim as ni

repo = Path.cwd().parents[1] if Path.cwd().name == "cookbook" else Path.cwd()

# Inbound: a nibabel image you already hold -> typed neuroim object.
nib_img = nib.load(str(repo / "golden_tests/fixtures/tiny_bold.nii.gz"))
vec = ni.from_nibabel(nib_img)

# Outbound: a typed neuroim object -> nibabel for a downstream tool.
back = vec.to_nibabel()

(type(vec).__name__, vec.shape, back.shape, back.affine.shape)
```

`from_nibabel` dispatches on dimensionality (4-D → `NeuroVec`, 3-D →
`NeuroVol`). `to_nibabel()` is defined on every typed container.

## What's guaranteed

- The affine survives both directions: `vec.space.affine` and
  `back.affine` describe the same world frame.
- `read_image(...)` is the documented entry point; `from_nibabel` /
  `to_nibabel` are the explicit interchange for callers who *already*
  hold a nibabel object. Interop is visible where it matters — it is
  not the documented main entry.

## What survives the file

If the typed object carries `.provenance`, `to_nibabel()` embeds the
Receipt as a NIfTI `comment` extension — so even an object that
*originated* from a plain nibabel image gains a recoverable Receipt
once a neuroim operation has produced a derived map from it. See
[Save a derived map](save-derived-map-with-provenance.qmd).

## Trapdoors

- `from_nibabel` on a < 3-D image raises `ValueError` — there is no
  spatial frame to attach.
- Round-tripping a *bare* nibabel image through `from_nibabel` →
  `to_nibabel` does **not** invent provenance. A Receipt exists only
  once a neuroim operation produced the derived value; interop alone
  does not synthesize one.

## See also

- [Start 01 — Read an image](../start/01-image.qmd) — why `read_image` is the hero, not `from_nibabel`.
- [Spec: Receipt NIfTI extension](../spec/receipt-nifti-extension.html) — the public on-disk contract a non-neuroim tool can read.
